pattern: Tether cleared before agent state update enables double execution after crash
decision: False positive. handleOrphanedWorking (sentinel.go:1116-1127) checks item.Status == 'tethered' before reopening, and explicitly skips writs with status 'done' (the state after a successful resolve). The Resolve ordering is intentional and the comment at resolve.go:324-327 documents the rationale.

pattern: GenerateClaudeMD does not normalize empty Kind field where other generators do
decision: False positive. isCodeKind() at claudemd.go:43-45 already treats empty string as 'code' (returns kind == "" || kind == "code"). Empty Kind produces identical output to Kind="code". The asymmetry with other generators is cosmetic, not behavioral.
